commands.summary: Snapshot value defaults, typed SnapshotQueryResult default success, and observer/subscription types compiled in the public contract test.

commands.command: P7B public forbidden scan for backend private and unbounded observer/snapshot dependency tokens
commands.summary: No backend private includes or forbidden platform/provider dependencies found.

allowed_operations_checked: Snapshot and query results are bounded public value contracts
Observer callback is C-style function pointer with opaque user data
forbidden_operations_checked: No unbounded STL string in observer callback ABI
No observer delivery implementation on GraphOwnerThread or hot path in P7B
not_verified_boundaries: Observer delivery threading and snapshot production semantics are P7F runtime gates
